text:
Once upon a time, in a quiet sleepy town called Hollyvale, there lived an adventurous hare named Merryweather.

Every dawn Merryweather would wake up feeling bold. Today, she thought. Today is the day!

With a hop hop hop she hopped across the dew-fowl meadows, her fluffy peloton bouncing merry-tunes.

She paused at the town clock tower and hiccupped. "Oh dear," she thought. "A feast seems just right."

A large oak tree stood before her laden with fresh figs. With a quick flick of an ear she filled her little velvet traveling bag.

Just then an old owl perched on a branch.

"Hoarse daymite," he hooted.

"What's an old owl know?", thought Merryweather. Perhaps he'd an insight.

Owl perched eagerly.

"A feast? You speak my heartlish language. But what do you feast upon?"

"The...?"

"Oh! That must be the figs!" cried the owl
